CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Dinosaurs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, scientific_name VARCHAR(100), common_name VARCHAR(100), domain VARCHAR(20), diet VARCHAR(20), period VARCHAR(60), height_m DECIMAL(4,1), length_m DECIMAL(5,1), weight_kg DECIMAL(10,1), avg_lifespan_yr INT, fun_fact TEXT)

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (1, 'Tyrannosaurus rex', 'T. Rex', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 3.7, 12.3, 8800.0, 30, 'Its bite force reached ~57,000 N, the strongest of any known terrestrial animal.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (2, 'Velociraptor mongoliensis', 'Velociraptor', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 0.5, 2.0, 15.0, 15, 'Was feathered and roughly the size of a turkey, unlike its Hollywood portrayal.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (3, 'Triceratops horridus', 'Triceratops', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 3.0, 9.0, 6800.0, 25, 'Its frill may have been used for thermoregulation in addition to display.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (4, 'Brachiosaurus altithorax', 'Brachiosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Jurassic', 13.0, 22.0, 56000.0, 100, 'Unlike most sauropods, its front legs were longer than its hind legs.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (5, 'Stegosaurus stenops', 'Stegosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Jurassic', 4.0, 9.0, 3500.0, 30, 'Its brain was roughly the size of a walnut, one of the smallest brain-to-body ratios.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (6, 'Spinosaurus aegyptiacus', 'Spinosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Piscivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 5.0, 15.0, 7400.0, 30, 'The only known dinosaur adapted for a semi-aquatic lifestyle, with paddle-like tail.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (7, 'Ankylosaurus magniventris', 'Ankylosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 1.7, 6.5, 6000.0, 25, 'Its tail club could deliver a blow capable of breaking bones of large predators.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (8, 'Parasaurolophus walkeri', 'Parasaurolophus', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 2.8, 9.5, 2500.0, 25, 'Its hollow crest likely functioned as a resonating chamber to produce low-frequency calls.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (9, 'Diplodocus longus', 'Diplodocus', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Jurassic', 5.0, 26.0, 14000.0, 80, 'Could crack its long tail like a whip, producing sonic booms for communication or defense.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (10, 'Allosaurus fragilis', 'Allosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Jurassic', 3.5, 9.7, 2300.0, 25, 'Was the apex predator of the Late Jurassic, ~80 million years before T. rex.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (11, 'Pachycephalosaurus wyomingensis', 'Pachycephalosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Omnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 1.8, 4.5, 450.0, 20, 'Its skull dome was up to 25 cm thick, likely used in head-butting contests.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (12, 'Carnotaurus sastrei', 'Carnotaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 3.0, 7.5, 1500.0, 20, 'Had the smallest forelimbs relative to body size of any large predatory dinosaur.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (13, 'Dilophosaurus wetherilli', 'Dilophosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Early Jurassic', 2.0, 6.0, 400.0, 20, 'Had no neck frill and did not spit venom — those traits were invented for the movie.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (14, 'Iguanodon bernissartensis', 'Iguanodon', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Early Cretaceous', 3.0, 10.0, 3400.0, 25, 'Was the second dinosaur ever formally named (1825) and had a distinctive thumb spike.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (15, 'Compsognathus longipes', 'Compsognathus', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Jurassic', 0.3, 1.0, 3.0, 10, 'One of the smallest known non-avian dinosaurs, roughly the size of a chicken.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (16, 'Therizinosaurus cheloniformis', 'Therizinosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 5.0, 10.0, 5000.0, 30, 'Possessed the longest claws of any known animal — up to 1 meter long.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (17, 'Giganotosaurus carolinii', 'Giganotosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 3.6, 12.5, 6500.0, 30, 'One of the largest terrestrial carnivores ever, slightly longer than T. rex.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (18, 'Argentinosaurus huinculensis', 'Argentinosaurus', 'Terrestrial', 'Herbivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 7.0, 35.0, 70000.0, 100, 'Among the heaviest land animals ever, estimated at up to 70 metric tons.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (19, 'Microraptor gui', 'Microraptor', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Early Cretaceous', NULL, 0.8, 1.0, 10, 'Had four wings — feathers on both arms and legs — and could likely glide between trees.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (20, 'Deinonychus antirrhopus', 'Deinonychus', 'Terrestrial', 'Carnivore', 'Early Cretaceous', 1.0, 3.4, 73.0, 15, 'Its discovery revolutionized the view of dinosaurs as active, warm-blooded animals.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (21, 'Mosasaurus hoffmannii', 'Mosasaurus', 'Aquatic', 'Carnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', NULL, 13.0, 15000.0, 25, 'Was a marine reptile (not a dinosaur) and one of the top predators of the Cretaceous seas.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (22, 'Elasmosaurus platyurus', 'Elasmosaurus', 'Aquatic', 'Piscivore', 'Late Cretaceous', NULL, 14.0, 2000.0, 30, 'Its neck contained 72 vertebrae — the most of any known animal.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (23, 'Liopleurodon ferox', 'Liopleurodon', 'Aquatic', 'Carnivore', 'Middle Jurassic', NULL, 6.4, 1700.0, 25, 'Often exaggerated in media; actual length was around 6-7 m, not 25 m.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (24, 'Ichthyosaurus communis', 'Ichthyosaurus', 'Aquatic', 'Piscivore', 'Early Jurassic', NULL, 2.0, 90.0, 20, 'Mary Anning discovered the first complete specimen in 1811 at age 12.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (25, 'Kronosaurus queenslandicus', 'Kronosaurus', 'Aquatic', 'Carnivore', 'Early Cretaceous', NULL, 10.0, 11000.0, 30, 'Named after the Titan Kronos; had teeth up to 30 cm long including the root.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (26, 'Pteranodon longiceps', 'Pteranodon', 'Aerial', 'Piscivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 1.8, NULL, 25.0, 15, 'Was toothless despite being a flying predator; its name means wing without tooth.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (27, 'Quetzalcoatlus northropi', 'Quetzalcoatlus', 'Aerial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 5.0, NULL, 250.0, 20, 'The largest known flying animal ever, with a wingspan of up to 10-11 meters.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (28, 'Dimorphodon macronyx', 'Dimorphodon', 'Aerial', 'Piscivore', 'Early Jurassic', NULL, NULL, 1.4, 10, 'Had an unusually large head for its body size and two distinct types of teeth.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (29, 'Rhamphorhynchus muensteri', 'Rhamphorhynchus', 'Aerial', 'Piscivore', 'Late Jurassic', NULL, NULL, 1.0, 10, 'Fossils found with fish remains in its throat reveal it hunted by skimming water.')

INSERT INTO Dinosaurs (id, scientific_name, common_name, domain, diet, period, height_m, length_m, weight_kg, avg_lifespan_yr, fun_fact) VALUES (30, 'Hatzegopteryx thambema', 'Hatzegopteryx', 'Aerial', 'Carnivore', 'Late Cretaceous', 4.5, NULL, 250.0, 20, 'Was likely the apex predator on Hateg Island, preying on dwarf dinosaurs.')
